# 1_ why use mark down language
```
to wwrite the notes 
git hub per readme files bnana ka lia 
blogs post karna ka lia
jupiter note book
```
not: hum iss ki mena mekdonwn ki file ka name .md lata ha e.g test.md
# 2_preview the cheat sheet and the mark down
```
press the 
ctrl+shift+p
then search in search baar markdown: open preview to side 
iss sa app side per diekh saka ga ka kia karti ha merk down
```
# 3_diffrence between the mark down and the word file
```
Markdown
A lightweight text format where you write using simple symbols (like #, *, -) to format text.
Word file (.docx)
A rich document format created using software like Microsoft Word with buttons, menus, and visual tools.
```
# 4_ write the headings
```
# space and then write whta you want
```
e.g
# headings
## heandigs 
### hea
#### gggg
##### ff
###### hhh
```
ctrl+k then iss ka baad v press karna sa bi preview hotajta ha
```
# 5_ write the block of words iss ko citation bi kahta ha >
> This is a block of words shown as a quote.
> 
> It can be multiple lines.
```
by using the
>
```
# 6_ line breaks 
hi my name is zbay

and i study in uo

and live in okara
``` 
line break mena ka ya iik line ma na ai ya diffrents lines ma ai

> \ iss ko bi line break ka lia use karta ha text ka last ma likhta ha iss ko only slash ki baat ha ya


# 7_combne 2 things block of words and headings
> ## heandig2
# 8_face of the text
**BOLD**
*ITALLIC*
***BOLD AND ITTALCIC***
> for bold use doble * and for the ittaclic use 1 tiem it and for bith taksk combine we use then 3 time we also use _ hum iss ko staric ki jaga bi use kar sakta ha hamari marzi ha iss ma
# 9_bullets poitns
- day1
- day2
  - day3
    - day4
- day5
OR use the numbers inms bi space lazmi ai gi 
1. day1
2. day2
3. day3
   4. day4
      5. day5
  > iss ma pahla number likha 1..5 and jo number likha iss ka baad space andthen day likha
# 10_line break or page break

hi my name is zubair

---
___
***

i live in okara
> _  - and * hum koi aik line or page break ka lia use kar sakta ha

> link use karna shaha wo bi kar skata ha

. blow is the qr image use as the link

> agr hum ![QR] use kara tu link ni bana ga balka direck imgae ai gi

study in uo

# 15_how to add the code and the code block
> use the back tick `

`print("pakistan is beatutiful country")`

> but block of code for this pupose we use ```

```
hi 
my name is zubair
and i live in okara 
```
# 16_adding tables
| specires | petaal | sepal |
|---- | ---- | ---- |
| aa | 22 | 33 |
| bb | 44 | 44 |

> | ---- |   iss ma agr hum | :---|  colon lgai tu iss ka nichal wala data left align hogai ha agr | ----: | as kara tu right align ho jai ga
> | :----: |   agr asa kara tu mid ma ai ga

# 18_install exptentions
```
mark down all in one
mark down pdf
mark down lint 
mark down shortcuts
```
> Bold karna ka lia text ko slelect akro or ctrl+b press karo
> ittalic ka lia select kro or then ctrl+i press karo
>  bold and ittalic dono karna ka lia text ko select karo and cltl+b+i
> press karo
# 19
[link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qJqAXjz-Rh4)
> ya link kasa bna ya btao ga ab 
> mana sab sa pahla sirf link likha
> then iss ko select kia 
> select karna ka baad right clik button press kia
> toggle yper link per clik kia 
> phir you tube ki video ka link oper jo serch baar open hoi iss ma paste karna ka baad enter ki tu ya link bn gai
# 20
![image](map.jpg)
> iss ma bi mana pahla image likha as text 
> then iss ko slect kia or right clik kia
> phir to toggle image per clik kia or oper ya copy ki hoi ya iss image ka name likh do enter karo bas 
```
agr hum ! ho erase kara iss masa tu link ai ga image ni

# 22 add code blck due extentions and we use it by riht clik 
```
sdfghjkl
dfghjkl
dfghjkl
lkjhgfd
lkjhgf
```

>  iss tara ya mana text likha or select kia  or right clik kar ka code block press kia tu hogia iss tara bold and ittaalic bi kar sakta ha hum

Column A | Column B | Column C
---------|----------|---------

 A2 | B2 | C2
 A3 | B3 | C3# 23_
> hum iss tara right clik sa bold ittalic cintations > 
> or table bi add kar sakta ha 
> add
> table with header bi kar sakta ha


Column A | Column B | Column C
---------|----------|---------
 A1 | B1 | C1
 A2 | B2 | C2
 A3 | B3 | C3 



# 24 make pdf
> install eextenion 
> vscode pdf
hum iss poori file ki pdf bi bna sakta ha iss tara right clik kara or scroll karo apko opetion mila ga 
>diffrent opeions ha mark down export pdf and export jpg and all wala bi open ha
# note  pdf bas cheat sheet ki bnti ha iss file ki ni bna gi
## mana cheat sheet ko html ma kia mgr yaha tu wo html ma show hoga mgr iss ka folder ma wo goolge ki tara show hoga
